name: A Glimpse of Central Vietnam 5 days
duration: Places:Da Nang - Hue - Hoi An - My Son Sanctuary
highlights: Delve into Vietnam’s past in the old capital Hue through historical attractions
Enjoy leisure time in the charming and tranquil town of Hoi An
Pay a visit to the ancient My Son Sanctuary and discover about the Champa Kingdom there

itinerary.title: Da Nang Arrival - Transfer to the Historic City of Hue
itinerary.description:
Morning

As soon as you reach Da Nang International Airport, there will be a guide with your name tag waiting for you. Then, you will head to Hue - a city with ancient beauty and deep history. Afternoon

When finishing check in procedures, you will have time to rest and be free to explore Hue on your own. In case you have not gotten any specific plan, BestPrice Travel offers the Hue night culinary tour half day with a local tour guide (Only from US $48 /pax)

NOTE: 

If you can not find our tour guide at the airport, please get in touch with BestPrice travel consultant. The check-in time is 14...

itinerary.title: Explore the Ancient Imperial City of Hue Half-day (Join Group)
itinerary.description:
Morning

Everyone will gather at 08:00 to get ready for a half-day trip around the ancient city of Hue. Kick off the journey as we hop on a Dragon Boat Trip. Floating through the Perfume River, tourists can immerse in the serene beauty of this city. Our first destination is Thien Mu Pagoda - a hundred year-old Buddhist temple which is the oldest temple in Hue. Then, be captivated by the breathtaking architecture and the serene ambience surroundings that grace the expansive Imperial Citadel,  the former residence of the Nguyen emperors - the last journey of the feudal period in Vietnam

itinerary.title: Hue - Transfer to Hoi An by bus
itinerary.description:
Morning

Today we will move out of the hotel in Hue to overnight at Hoi An. After breakfast and the check-out session, your group will be transferred to Hoi An Town via Hai Van Pass - literally 'Cloud ocean pass'. Afternoon

Following the hotel check-in procedures, tourists will have all the time left in the day to enjoy their vacation in Hoi An Ancient Town. You can explore the streets that are filled with the laid-back atmosphere and all the beautiful lanterns hanging around. If you need an expert to guide, you should book a half-day tour below to have an exciting  well-planned itinerary for...

itinerary.title: My Son Holly Land - Tracing the Ancient Cham Civilization
itinerary.description:
Morning

Around 07:00, tourists head to My Son Sanctuary - a series of ruined and partially collapsed Hindu temples in central Vietnam. For more information, My Son Sanctuary was the religious and political capital of the Champa Kingdom, therefore it provides more history about them. Passing Tra Kieu, in case Sa Huynh Champa Culture Museum is open, we might pay it a visit. (This museum tour may or may not be included in the itinerary due to its varying opening hours)

Afternoon

Your group will return to Hoi An at 12:00. After that, you can spend time in your hotel or have a self-exploration a...

itinerary.title: Farewell to Hoi An - Da Nang Departure
itinerary.description:
Morning

After a delightful breakfast, prepare all of your luggages and get ready to check out. Commence your tour with a road trip towards Da Nang where you take your departure flight.

included: Accommodation in Twin/ Double sharing room
All transport within Vietnam (including airport pick up & see off), as per itinerary
All in-tour stationed local English speaking guide.
Entrance fees for Vietnam attractions, as per itinerary
Meals as indicated in the program
